name: Ami
goal: Ami hopes to create a surprise party that surpasses Tina's expectations and becomes a cherished memory for her 25th birthday.
backstory: Ami and Tina have been inseparable since college, sharing countless memories and making it a point to celebrate each other's birthdays in style. Last year, Ami organized a surprise weekend getaway for Tina's birthday, which turned out to be an unforgettable experience. This year, Ami wants to top that with an even more memorable 25th birthday party for Tina.

focus_notes.cost: For Ami, cost is a consideration but not the primary focus; they believe that some expenses, like hiring a professional photographer or renting a unique venue, can be worthwhile if they significantly enhance Tina's birthday experience.
focus_notes.comfort: Ensuring everyone's comfort at the party is crucial for Ami, which includes choosing a venue that is accessible and pleasant for all guests, as well as planning activities that cater to different interests and preferences.
focus_notes.time: Timing is everything for Ami when it comes to Tina's birthday party; they are meticulous about scheduling, from sending out invitations at the right time to planning the reveal of surprise elements during the party.
focus_notes.safety: Ami prioritizes safety without making it overly restrictive; they want to ensure that all activities and the venue chosen are safe for everyone involved while still allowing for fun and spontaneity.
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: Being flexible is vital for Ami, as they understand that last-minute changes or unexpected events can occur; they remain open to adjustments in plans if it means the party will be more enjoyable or successful for Tina and their guests.
